Pet Protection Promise™ · Because a will isn't enough

For pet owners, animals are family. Plan like it.

A will mentions your pet. It doesn't move them. The Pet Protection Promise™ is the complete care plan most wills miss — built so the person stepping in for your pet has everything they need on day one.

The most preventable risk pets face isn't abuse or neglect. It's lack of planning. When an owner becomes ill, incapacitated, or passes away without a documented plan, animals can end up in shelters through no fault of their own. This closes that gap.

What's inside
  • Primary & backup caregiver
    Properly designated and notified — not "left to my sister"
  • Funded care budget
    Cash-gift clause sized to actual monthly costs
  • Pet Care Playbook PDF
    Feeding, meds, vet, behaviour, routine — one document
  • Emergency 24-hour bridge plan
    For the gap before the will activates
  • Printable wallet card
    Vet, microchip, caregiver — for your wallet
  • Voice or video letter
    So they hear you when it matters most
  • Province / state-correct
    Legally valid across Canada and all 50 US states
  • Update reminders
    Stays current as your pet ages and life changes

Quick checklist
    🛡 Your data
    AES-256 encryption
    FutureVault · SOC 2 Type II
    Legally valid · CA + all 50 US states
    Close the incapacity gap
    Pet Protection covers death. POA for Property + Health covers the times you're alive but can't act. Both are included in the Complete Plan ($159) and Couples Plan ($249).
    Pet Protection Promise™ · Built by Barrett Tax Law & Donsky & Donsky Legacy Optimization Inc. · Legally valid across Canada and all 50 U.S. states.

    Share with your caregiver

    We'll send your primary caregiver a secure read-only link to the Pet Protection Plan. They'll see everything they need: routine, vet, meds, behaviour notes, your letter to them.

    Your caregiver gets read-only access. Updates sync automatically when you change anything.

    Set update reminders

    Pet care changes constantly. We'll nudge you to review your plan when these things happen — quick check-ins, two minutes each.

    Pet Protection covers death. POA covers the rest.

    Statistically, you're far more likely to be temporarily incapacitated — hospital stay, surgery recovery, cognitive decline — than to die suddenly. A Power of Attorney is the document that lets your chosen person act on your behalf during those windows.

    Complete Plan — $159
    Will + POA for Property + POA for Health + Treasure Chest + Pet Protection Promise included free.
    Couples Plan — $249
    Everything in Complete, for both partners. 2× POA for Property, 2× POA for Health. Pet Protection covers shared pets in one plan.

    Your pet's emergency wallet card

    A printable mini-card with the essentials a stranger or first-responder would need if you're incapacitated and your pet is found. Print, fold, keep in wallet.
